files.doc: Measurement harness for the Active Context Layer (design §7, step 3).
dekko: static code map generator (MAP.md + map.json).
Select the tests impacted by a change.
Per-file extraction cache stored under ``.dekko/``.
Shared path classification: test code vs production code.
dekko: programmatically map a repository into MAP.md/map.json.
Context packs: the minimal neighborhood needed to work on a target.
Compare the working tree's symbols against an earlier git rev.
Render the call graph as Mermaid or Graphviz DOT.
Tree-sitter extraction: source file → symbols, raw calls, imports.
Tier-2 extraction: best-effort symbols for any grammar.
Claude Code hook entrypoints: the opt-in push layer (Pillar A).
Language registry: extensions, grammars, and tree-sitter queries.
Session ledger: what is already in the agent's context (Pillar C).
Read map.json back into a queryable index; provenance + freshness.
Shared data model for the code map: symbols, calls, edges.
Symbol-anchored notes: durable, committable annotations on code.
Proactive orientation: the opt-in push layer (F4).
Structural outline of a file or directory: signatures, no bodies.
Query the loaded map index: callers, callees, symbols, files.
Task-aware relevance scoring (Pillar B).
Render the map as one self-contained interactive HTML file.
Render the extracted symbol/call graph as map.json.
The lean map: a budget-capped navigation map for agents.
Render the extracted symbol/call graph as MAP.md.
Best-effort static call resolution: raw calls → graph edges.
A hand-rolled MCP server exposing the map over stdio.
Best-effort reads of repository source files.
Aggregate metrics over the map: hotspots, sizes, language mix.
A compact repo digest: the middle ground between MAP.md and a query.
Small shared text helpers for the read-command renderers.
Trace shortest call path(s) between two symbols.
Find symbols with no inbound calls that look like dead code.
File discovery: enumerate mappable source files in a repository.
Task-scoped work-set bundles: one budgeted call for a whole change.
Shared pytest configuration.
The affected subcommand: impacted test selection and exit codes.
Regression guard for the context-layer benchmark (design §7, step 3).
Unit tests for the shared budgeting seam (Meter + fit_to_budget).
The .dekko incremental cache: creation, reuse, and --full.
CLI surface tests: flags, output resolution, plugin install.
Context packs: neighborhood building, hops, budget trimming.
Context pack v2: doc lines, --with-source, call-site excerpts.
Pillar D: dense encoding and the FR-D3 density metric.
MAP.md embedded mermaid diagram: scale-guard tiers and block syntax.
The diff subcommand: added/removed/changed symbols and exit codes.
Doc-line extraction: ``Symbol.doc`` and ``FileMap.doc``.
The export command: mermaid/dot rendering, scope, size guard.
Extraction tests for the Tier-1 Python and Rust queries.
The mtime/size fast path in check_freshness skips redundant hashing.
Tier-2 generic fallback tests (Ruby fixture).
Pillar A: the opt-in Claude Code push hooks.
B5: trust line, largest-files overview, and churn x fan-in hotspots.
B7: interactive HTML export — document, escaping, size guard, CLI.
Per-language extraction and resolution tests for Tier-1 specs.
FR1 file backbone: floor guarantee, dense encoding, determinism.
Pillar C read side: the transcript-projected session ledger.
map.json round-trip, provenance, and freshness checks.
B6: minor-file collapse, test grouping, and ``--order``.
Symbol-anchored notes: CRUD, rendering, orphans, MCP, committability.
Proactive orientation (F4): session digest + pre-read advisory.
Outline subcommand: structure, nesting, size framing, budget.
MAP.md Overview section: rollup table, hotspots, anchor links.
Guard the package's declared requires-python floor.
Query subcommand: actions, target syntax, exit codes.
A2 query surface: --sites, uses, --no-tests, ranking, footers.
Pillar B: task-aware relevance scoring and the --task blend.
MAP.md rendering: the agent-steering header and purpose lines.
End-to-end resolution tests over the language fixtures.
map.json doc version 3: edge lines, externals, test flags, compat.
The hand-rolled MCP server: protocol handling and tool dispatch.
Sharded MAP.md: mode matrix, auto threshold, orphans, link resolution.
The stats command: counts, hotspots, language mix.
Status subcommand exit codes and the auto-regen/no-regen paths.
The summary digest and the MCP resource that serves it.
Q2 token-counting seam: fallback, backend selection, determinism.
Trace subcommand: shortest call paths, exit codes, JSON shape.
The unused command: root rules, used-via-container, exit codes.
Guard: the version is declared in four places and must agree.
File discovery tests.
The workset subcommand: seeds, tiered budget, and exit codes.

symbols.name: Task
symbols.doc: One measured scenario.

symbols.name: Result
symbols.doc: The measured cost of one task under both strategies.

symbols.name: saved
symbols.doc: Tokens not spent by using dekko (can be negative).

symbols.name: reduction
symbols.doc: Fractional reduction vs baseline, or ``0.0`` when no baseline.

symbols.name: as_dict
symbols.doc: Structured row for JSON output.

symbols.name: _capture_tokens
symbols.doc: Run a stdout-printing command and return its output's token cost.

symbols.name: _file_tokens
symbols.doc: Token cost of reading a whole file, or ``0`` if unreadable.

symbols.name: _caller_paths
symbols.doc: Distinct files that call into a symbol (the def file included).

symbols.name: _measure_outline
symbols.doc: Whole-file read vs ``dekko outline`` for one file.

symbols.name: _measure_context
symbols.doc: Read the symbol's file + caller files vs ``dekko context``.

symbols.name: _measure_workset
symbols.doc: Read the symbol's file + impacted tests vs ``dekko workset``.

symbols.name: _measure_lean
symbols.doc: Absolute cost of the whole-repo lean map and what it covers.

symbols.name: run_task
symbols.doc: Measure a single task, dispatching on its kind.

symbols.name: run_all
symbols.doc: Measure every task against the map at ``root``.

symbols.name: session_cost
symbols.doc: Live per-session context cost from the ledger (the future on/off).

symbols.name: render_report
symbols.doc: Render results as a dense text report with an aggregate line.

symbols.name: main
symbols.doc: CLI: ``python benchmarks/measure.py [--root DIR] [--json]``.

symbols.name: TestImpact
symbols.doc: One impacted test file and why it is impacted.

symbols.name: _changed_for_calls
symbols.doc: Symbol ids present in the new tree (added + changed).

symbols.name: _changed_files
symbols.doc: Every file touched by the diff (added, changed, or removed).

symbols.name: _reverse_hops
symbols.doc: Minimum reverse-call distance from any seed to each reachable id.

symbols.name: _id_path
symbols.doc: Repo-relative file path embedded in a symbol or module id.

symbols.name: _call_impacts
symbols.doc: Test files reached from seed symbols through call edges.

symbols.name: _finalize
symbols.doc: Order each file's symbols, then files strongest-evidence first.

symbols.name: _import_hits
symbols.doc: Test files whose imports resolve to any changed file.

symbols.name: analyze
symbols.doc: Combine call-edge and import evidence into impacted test files.

symbols.name: impacts_from_symbol
symbols.doc: Call-edge impacts for a static seed (no diff, no import tier).

symbols.name: _impact_json
symbols.doc: Structured rendering of one impacted test file.

symbols.name: _impact_rows
symbols.doc: Flatten impacted files and their symbols into display rows.

symbols.name: render
symbols.doc: Emit the impacted-test report as text or JSON.

symbols.name: _pytest_hint
symbols.doc: A ready-to-paste pytest invocation, or empty when none apply.

symbols.name: changes
symbols.doc: Impacted tests plus the underlying diff for worktree-vs-rev.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Execute ``dekko affected`` against a repository.

symbols.name: _tool_version
symbols.doc: Current dekko version, used to invalidate stale extractions.

symbols.name: _filemap_to_dict
symbols.doc: Serialize a ``FileMap`` for the cache.

symbols.name: _filemap_from_dict
symbols.doc: Rebuild a ``FileMap`` from its cached dict.

symbols.name: IncrementalCache
symbols.doc: A read-old / write-new view over the per-file extraction cache.

symbols.name: __init__
symbols.doc: Initialize with the entries loaded from a prior run.

symbols.name: reuse
symbols.doc: Return the cached ``FileMap`` for an unchanged file.

symbols.name: store
symbols.doc: Record a freshly extracted ``FileMap`` for persistence.

symbols.name: load
symbols.doc: Load the prior cache entries for a repository.

symbols.name: save
symbols.doc: Persist a cache, wiring gitignore only if ``.dekko/`` is new.

symbols.name: ensure_dir
symbols.doc: Create ``.dekko/``, wiring gitignore only when it is new.

symbols.name: ensure_notes_tracked
symbols.doc: Ensure ``.dekko/`` exists and its inner gitignore tracks notes.

symbols.name: _make_cache_dir
symbols.doc: Return ``.dekko/``, creating it and wiring gitignore if absent.

symbols.name: _write_inner_gitignore
symbols.doc: Write the notes-aware inner ``.gitignore`` if safe to do so.

symbols.name: is_test_path
symbols.doc: Whether a repo-relative POSIX path looks like test code.

symbols.name: relevance_key
symbols.doc: Sort key for budget-drop ordering (lowest-ranked dropped first).

symbols.name: build_legacy_parser
symbols.doc: Construct the legacy flag-based parser (v0.2 aliases).

symbols.name: _add_map_options
symbols.doc: Attach the mapping output/filter options shared by both parsers.

symbols.name: _add_read_options
symbols.doc: Attach the options shared by map-reading subcommands.

symbols.name: _add_task_option
symbols.doc: Attach the ``--task`` relevance flag (Pillar B).

symbols.name: build_subcommand_parser
symbols.doc: Construct the subcommand parser (map/query/context/status).

symbols.name: extract_one
symbols.doc: Extract a single file, or ``None`` when it is unsupported.

symbols.name: _resolve_workers
symbols.doc: Map a ``--jobs`` value to a concrete worker count (0 → all cores).

symbols.name: _extract_misses
symbols.doc: Extract the cache-miss files, in parallel when it pays off.

symbols.name: map_repository
symbols.doc: Discover and extract every mappable file under a root.

symbols.name: resolve_outputs
symbols.doc: Resolve the markdown and JSON output paths.

symbols.name: _resolve_shard
symbols.doc: Apply the ``--output`` precedence rule to the shard mode.

symbols.name: _write_pages
symbols.doc: Write the index and any directory pages; wipe stale pages first.

symbols.name: _summary
symbols.doc: Build the human-readable run summary.

symbols.name: _run_subprocess
symbols.doc: Run a CLI command, capturing its output as text.

symbols.name: _claude_cli_present
symbols.doc: Return True if the ``claude`` CLI is on PATH, else warn and False.

symbols.name: claude_install
symbols.doc: Register the bundled plugin with the Claude Code CLI.

symbols.name: claude_uninstall
symbols.doc: Remove the bundled plugin from the Claude Code CLI.

symbols.name: mcp_install
symbols.doc: Register the MCP server with Claude Code via ``claude mcp add``.

symbols.name: mcp_uninstall
symbols.doc: Remove the standalone MCP server via ``claude mcp remove``.

symbols.name: run_map
symbols.doc: Execute the mapping action for parsed CLI arguments.

symbols.name: _map_is_fresh
symbols.doc: True when the existing map matches the request and is fresh.

symbols.name: _load_or_regen
symbols.doc: Load the map at root, regenerating when missing or stale.

symbols.name: regen_map
symbols.doc: Re-generate the map at ``root`` with its recorded options.

symbols.name: _cmd_map
symbols.doc: Adapter: ``dekko map DIR`` → ``run_map`` namespace.

symbols.name: _read_index
symbols.doc: Load (auto-regen) the index for a read command, applying filters.

symbols.name: run_query
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko query``.

symbols.name: run_outline
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko outline <path>``.

symbols.name: run_context
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko context``.

symbols.name: run_trace
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko trace <from> <to>``.

symbols.name: run_diff
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko diff [REV]``.

symbols.name: run_affected
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko affected [REV]``.

symbols.name: run_workset
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko workset [REV] | --symbol NAME``.

symbols.name: run_unused
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko unused``.

symbols.name: run_stats
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko stats``.

symbols.name: run_summary
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko summary``.

symbols.name: run_lean
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko lean``.

symbols.name: run_ledger
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko ledger``.

symbols.name: run_hooks_install
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko hooks install``.

symbols.name: run_hooks_uninstall
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko hooks uninstall``.

symbols.name: run_hooks_run
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko hooks run <event>`` (reads JSON on stdin).

symbols.name: run_orient
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko orient [--read PATH]``.

symbols.name: run_note
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko note add|list|rm``.

symbols.name: _resolve_for_note
symbols.doc: Resolve a note target to a symbol id (no map regeneration).

symbols.name: _note_add
symbols.doc: Anchor a note to a resolved symbol.

symbols.name: _note_rm
symbols.doc: Remove one note (or all) from a resolved symbol.

symbols.name: _note_list
symbols.doc: List notes: all, orphaned, or for a single symbol.

symbols.name: run_export
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko export``.

symbols.name: run_serve
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko serve --mcp``.

symbols.name: run_status
symbols.doc: Handle ``dekko status`` (never regenerates).

symbols.name: _legacy_main
symbols.doc: Parse and dispatch the legacy flag-based invocation.

symbols.name: main
symbols.doc: CLI entry point.

symbols.name: PackEntry
symbols.doc: One neighbor in a context pack.

symbols.name: Pack
symbols.doc: A built context pack, ready to render.

symbols.name: _neighbors
symbols.doc: Adjacent symbol ids of one node, tagged with direction.

symbols.name: build_pack
symbols.doc: BFS the call graph around a symbol up to ``hops``.

symbols.name: build_file_pack
symbols.doc: Assemble a file-mode pack: own symbols + outside callers.

symbols.name: attach_source
symbols.doc: Attach the target's body and hop-1 caller call-site excerpts.

symbols.name: _entry_lines
symbols.doc: Render one neighbor entry (with doc and call-site lines).

symbols.name: _target_lines
symbols.doc: The target's signature/location/doc block, if any.

symbols.name: _source_lines
symbols.doc: The inlined source section, if any.

symbols.name: render_text
symbols.doc: Render a pack as compact text.

symbols.name: _pack_meter
symbols.doc: Cost meter for a pack, with trimmed neighbors as omissions.

symbols.name: _estimate_tokens
symbols.doc: Crude token estimate of the rendered pack.

symbols.name: _entry_scores
symbols.doc: Blend task relevance with call degree over a pack's neighbors.

symbols.name: trim_to_budget
symbols.doc: Drop pack content until it fits the token budget.

symbols.name: _render_json
symbols.doc: Render a pack as structured JSON.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Build, trim, and print a context pack for a target.

symbols.name: Snapshot
symbols.doc: Symbols and inbound adjacency for one mapped tree.

symbols.name: SymbolDelta
symbols.doc: One changed symbol and the symbols that call it.

symbols.name: DiffResult
symbols.doc: Added/removed/changed symbols between two snapshots.

symbols.name: empty
symbols.doc: True when nothing was added, removed, or changed.

symbols.name: _body_hash
symbols.doc: Short hash of a symbol's defining source lines.

symbols.name: snapshot
symbols.doc: Map a tree and capture its symbols, callers, and body hashes.

symbols.name: export_rev
symbols.doc: Extract the tracked sources at ``rev`` into ``dest``.

symbols.name: _render_caller
symbols.doc: One-line label for a caller id (resolved or module-level).

symbols.name: _callers_of
symbols.doc: Caller labels for a symbol id within a snapshot.

symbols.name: compare
symbols.doc: Diff two snapshots into added/removed/changed deltas.

symbols.name: _delta_json
symbols.doc: Structured rendering of one symbol delta.

symbols.name: _print_delta
symbols.doc: Print one symbol delta and a capped list of its callers.

symbols.name: render
symbols.doc: Emit a diff result as text or JSON.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Execute ``dekko diff`` against a repository.

symbols.name: _dir_of
symbols.doc: Directory portion of a repo-relative path (``.`` for the root).

symbols.name: _path_of
symbols.doc: File path backing a graph node id (symbol or module origin).

symbols.name: _symbol_graph
symbols.doc: Build ``(labels, edges)`` at symbol scope.

symbols.name: _file_graph
symbols.doc: Build ``(labels, edges)`` at file scope (no self-loops).

symbols.name: dir_graph
symbols.doc: Build ``(labels, edges)`` at directory scope (no self-loops).

symbols.name: build_graph
symbols.doc: Dispatch graph construction by scope.

symbols.name: overview_graph
symbols.doc: Pick the graph to embed in MAP.md's overview, with a scale guard.

symbols.name: _ids
symbols.doc: Assign stable ``n0``/``n1`` ids to graph nodes.

symbols.name: render_mermaid
symbols.doc: Render a flowchart in Mermaid syntax.

symbols.name: render_dot
symbols.doc: Render a digraph in Graphviz DOT syntax.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Emit the call graph in the requested format.

symbols.name: _text
symbols.doc: Decode a node's source text, collapsing internal whitespace.

symbols.name: _compiled_query
symbols.doc: Compile a query once per (grammar, query) pair.

symbols.name: _run_query
symbols.doc: Run a cached compiled query, returning its matches.

symbols.name: _one
symbols.doc: Return the first capture for a name, or ``None``.

symbols.name: extract_file
symbols.doc: Extract all symbols, calls, and imports from one source file.

symbols.name: _collect_definitions
symbols.doc: Find every function/method/class definition in the tree.

symbols.name: _receiver_container
symbols.doc: Type name from a Go method receiver list, e.g. ``(s *Server)``.

symbols.name: _make_symbol
symbols.doc: Build a ``Symbol`` with container qualification and unique id.

symbols.name: _symbol_flags
symbols.doc: Detect ``(decorated, exported)`` for a definition node.

symbols.name: _is_decorated
symbols.doc: Whether a definition carries a decorator/attribute/annotation.

symbols.name: _is_exported
symbols.doc: Whether a definition is part of the language's public surface.

symbols.name: _has_child
symbols.doc: Whether any direct child has the given node type.

symbols.name: _has_prev_sibling
symbols.doc: Whether any preceding sibling has the given node type.

symbols.name: _ancestor_is
symbols.doc: Whether an ancestor within ``depth`` hops has the given type.

symbols.name: _modifiers_node
symbols.doc: The ``modifiers`` child of a Java declaration, if present.

symbols.name: _modifiers_have
symbols.doc: Whether the Java ``modifiers`` node contains any of ``kinds``.

symbols.name: _modifiers_keyword
symbols.doc: Whether the Java ``modifiers`` node contains a literal keyword.

symbols.name: _qualify
symbols.doc: Collect container names above a definition, outermost first.

symbols.name: _strip_generics
symbols.doc: Drop a trailing generic parameter list: ``Foo<T>`` → ``Foo``.

symbols.name: _raw
symbols.doc: Decode a node's source text, preserving newlines.

symbols.name: _clean_doc
symbols.doc: Collapse whitespace and truncate a doc line.

symbols.name: _string_first_line
symbols.doc: First non-empty content line of a string literal.

symbols.name: _strip_comment_markers
symbols.doc: Drop leading/trailing comment syntax from one line.

symbols.name: _comment_first_line
symbols.doc: First non-empty content line of a comment block.

symbols.name: _leading_string
symbols.doc: The docstring node opening a block, if any.

symbols.name: _python_docstring
symbols.doc: First docstring line of a Python function/class body.

symbols.name: _end_row
symbols.doc: Last row a node occupies, excluding a trailing newline.

symbols.name: _doc_comment_above
symbols.doc: First line of the contiguous comment block above a definition.

symbols.name: _doc_for_symbol
symbols.doc: Best-effort first doc line for a definition, or ``None``.

symbols.name: _module_doc
symbols.doc: Best-effort first doc line for a whole file, or ``None``.

symbols.name: _params_python
symbols.doc: Parse a Python ``parameters`` node.

symbols.name: _params_rust
symbols.doc: Parse a Rust ``parameters`` node.

symbols.name: _params_generic
symbols.doc: Best-effort parse: try name/type fields, else raw text.

symbols.name: _params_c
symbols.doc: Parse a C/C++ ``parameter_list`` node.

symbols.name: _innermost_identifier
symbols.doc: Find the identifier nested inside a C declarator.

symbols.name: _params_js
symbols.doc: Parse a JavaScript ``formal_parameters`` node.

symbols.name: _params_ts
symbols.doc: Parse a TypeScript ``formal_parameters`` node.

symbols.name: _params_go
symbols.doc: Parse a Go ``parameter_list`` node.

symbols.name: _parse_params
symbols.doc: Dispatch parameter parsing by language style.

symbols.name: _collect_calls
symbols.doc: Find call expressions and attribute them to enclosing defs.

symbols.name: _callee_parts
symbols.doc: Split a callee node into (full text, base name, receiver).

symbols.name: _callee_java
symbols.doc: Handle Java's call shapes, which carry their own arguments.

symbols.name: _split_callee_text
symbols.doc: Heuristically split callee text into (name, receiver).

symbols.name: _enclosing
symbols.doc: Innermost definition whose span contains the byte offset.

symbols.name: _collect_imports
symbols.doc: Extract imported names for the resolver, per language.

symbols.name: _imports_python
symbols.doc: Normalize Python import/from-import matches.

symbols.name: _imports_rust
symbols.doc: Flatten Rust ``use`` declarations into imported names.

symbols.name: _imports_js
symbols.doc: Normalize JS/TS import statements (named and default).

symbols.name: _imports_generic
symbols.doc: Fallback: any ``@name``/``@module`` capture becomes an import.

symbols.name: _strip_quotes
symbols.doc: Drop string quotes and include angle brackets.

symbols.name: _parse_rust_use
symbols.doc: Expand a ``use`` argument into ``(local_name, source)`` pairs.

symbols.name: _rust_use_leaf
symbols.doc: Resolve a brace-free use path to its local binding.

symbols.name: _split_top_level
symbols.doc: Split on commas not nested inside braces.

symbols.name: extract_file_generic
symbols.doc: Extract symbols and calls from a Tier-2 language file.

symbols.name: _walk
symbols.doc: Yield every named node, depth-first.

symbols.name: _is_definition
symbols.doc: Heuristic: does this node define a callable?

symbols.name: _is_class
symbols.doc: Heuristic: does this node define a class-like container?

symbols.name: _make_symbol
symbols.doc: Build a symbol from a heuristic definition node.

symbols.name: _containers
symbols.doc: Names of class-like ancestors, outermost first.

symbols.name: _collect_calls
symbols.doc: Attribute heuristic call nodes to their enclosing symbols.

symbols.name: _call_parts
symbols.doc: Find the callee name/receiver on a heuristic call node.

symbols.name: _root_from
symbols.doc: Resolve the repo root from a hook payload's ``cwd``.

symbols.name: _load_index
symbols.doc: Load the map; optionally auto-regenerate a stale one.

symbols.name: _additional_context
symbols.doc: The hookSpecificOutput envelope that injects ``text`` as context.

symbols.name: session_start
symbols.doc: Inject a steering preamble + budget-capped lean map (FR-A1).

symbols.name: _adaptive_top
symbols.doc: Fewer files as the session's token budget fills (FR-C3).

symbols.name: _file_candidates
symbols.doc: Relevance candidates for files not already fully in context.

symbols.name: _relevant_files
symbols.doc: Top task-relevant, not-yet-read files, budget-scaled and gated.

symbols.name: prompt_submit
symbols.doc: Point at the files most relevant to the new prompt (FR-A2).

symbols.name: _view
symbols.doc: Build the session ledger from the payload's transcript, if any.

symbols.name: pre_read
symbols.doc: Advise outlining a large file first — non-blocking (FR-A3, Q5).

symbols.name: _rel_to_root
symbols.doc: Normalize an absolute read path to repo-relative POSIX, or None.

symbols.name: dispatch
symbols.doc: Run a hook handler over stdin JSON and print its output.

symbols.name: settings_path
symbols.doc: Project-local Claude Code settings file for ``root``.

symbols.name: _load_settings
symbols.doc: Read existing settings, or an empty object (best-effort).

symbols.name: _entry
symbols.doc: One settings hooks entry invoking ``dekko hooks run <event>``.

symbols.name: _is_dekko_entry
symbols.doc: Whether a settings hooks entry is one of ours.

symbols.name: install
symbols.doc: Merge dekko hook entries into project settings (idempotent).

symbols.name: _already_installed
symbols.doc: Whether ``event`` is already wired in a settings bucket.

symbols.name: uninstall
symbols.doc: Remove all dekko hook entries from project settings.

symbols.name: LanguageSpec
symbols.doc: Static description of how to extract symbols for one language.

symbols.name: spec_for_path
symbols.doc: Return the Tier-1 spec for a filename, or ``None``.

symbols.name: tier2_grammar_for_path
symbols.doc: Return the Tier-2 grammar name for a filename, or ``None``.

symbols.name: is_supported
symbols.doc: Check whether any registered language handles this filename.

symbols.name: FileState
symbols.doc: What the session knows about one file's presence in context.

symbols.name: LedgerView
symbols.doc: A projection of the session transcript into context state.

symbols.name: symbols
symbols.doc: Every symbol id in context, across all files.

symbols.name: has_symbol
symbols.doc: Whether a symbol is already in context (FR-C2 dedup check).

symbols.name: has_file
symbols.doc: Whether a file has been read or surfaced this session.

symbols.name: remaining
symbols.doc: Budget left under ``session_budget`` (never below ``floor``).

symbols.name: as_dict
symbols.doc: Structured view for JSON output.

symbols.name: iter_records
symbols.doc: Yield parseable JSON records from a transcript, skipping junk.

symbols.name: _rel_path
symbols.doc: Normalize a read target to a repo-relative POSIX path, or None.

symbols.name: _content_blocks
symbols.doc: The message content blocks of a record, or an empty list.

symbols.name: _is_direct
symbols.doc: Whether a tool_use was issued by the main agent (not a subagent).

symbols.name: _usage_total
symbols.doc: Context-window occupancy from an assistant turn's usage, if any.

symbols.name: _read_symbols
symbols.doc: Fold a ``Read``'s file/line-range into a file's seen symbols.

symbols.name: _apply_read
symbols.doc: Register a ``Read`` tool call against the ledger.

symbols.name: _apply_dekko
symbols.doc: Attribute a dekko tool call's target file as dekko-emitted.

symbols.name: _apply_tool_use
symbols.doc: Route one tool_use block to the right ledger update.

symbols.name: build_view
symbols.doc: Project a session transcript into a :class:`LedgerView`.

symbols.name: _block_estimate
symbols.doc: Rough token cost of a non-tool_use content block (fallback tally).

symbols.name: _encode_project
symbols.doc: Claude Code's project-dir encoding of a repo path (best-effort).

symbols.name: find_transcript
symbols.doc: Locate a session transcript for ``root`` under ``~/.claude``.

symbols.name: render_text
symbols.doc: Render the ledger view as dense human/agent-readable lines.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Inspect what the session has put in context (FR-C4).

symbols.name: compute_provenance
symbols.doc: Build the provenance stamp for a freshly generated map.

symbols.name: _git_commit
symbols.doc: Return the HEAD commit of the repo at root, or ``None``.

symbols.name: _file_hash
symbols.doc: Short content hash used for staleness comparison.

symbols.name: _stat_sig
symbols.doc: ``[mtime_ns, size]`` signature for the freshness fast path.

symbols.name: MapIndex
symbols.doc: map.json loaded into lookup structures.

symbols.name: degree
symbols.doc: Total fan-in + fan-out of a symbol id.

symbols.name: without_tests
symbols.doc: A filtered view with all test-path code removed.

symbols.name: _prod_id
symbols.doc: Whether a symbol/module id belongs to production (non-test) code.

symbols.name: _filter_adjacency
symbols.doc: Drop test-path nodes from an adjacency table, keys and values.

symbols.name: _filter_paths
symbols.doc: Drop test-path keys from a path-keyed mapping.

symbols.name: Freshness
symbols.doc: Result of comparing a map's provenance to the working tree.

symbols.name: _symbol_from_dict
symbols.doc: Rebuild a ``Symbol`` (with ``Param``s) from its JSON dict.

symbols.name: _load_notes
symbols.doc: Read ``.dekko/notes.json`` into symbol id → note texts.

symbols.name: _callee_base
symbols.doc: Base identifier of an external callee text.

symbols.name: load_map
symbols.doc: Load ``root/.dekko/map.json`` into a ``MapIndex``.

symbols.name: index_from_maps
symbols.doc: Build a ``MapIndex`` from in-memory extraction results.

symbols.name: check_freshness
symbols.doc: Compare an index's provenance against the current tree.

symbols.name: Param
symbols.doc: A single function parameter.

symbols.name: Symbol
symbols.doc: A function, method, or class definition found in a file.

symbols.name: RawCall
symbols.doc: A call expression as written, before resolution.

symbols.name: Import
symbols.doc: A name imported into a file.

symbols.name: FileMap
symbols.doc: Everything extracted from a single source file.

symbols.name: Edge
symbols.doc: A resolved caller → callee relationship.

symbols.name: ExternalCall
symbols.doc: A call whose target is outside the repo.

symbols.name: CallGraph
symbols.doc: Resolution results across the whole repo.

symbols.name: _notes_path
symbols.doc: Location of the notes file under a repo root.

symbols.name: load
symbols.doc: Load the symbol-id → note-records map (empty when absent).

symbols.name: texts_by_id
symbols.doc: Symbol id → note texts, for inline rendering.

symbols.name: save
symbols.doc: Write the notes file, ensuring it stays git-tracked.

symbols.name: add
symbols.doc: Append a note to a symbol and persist it.

symbols.name: remove
symbols.doc: Remove one note (by index) or all notes for a symbol.

symbols.name: orphaned
symbols.doc: Notes whose symbol id is not among ``known_ids``.

symbols.name: _session
symbols.doc: Render the orientation digest: preamble + budgeted summary.

symbols.name: _rel_path
symbols.doc: Normalize a read target to a repo-relative POSIX path, or None.

symbols.name: _advise
symbols.doc: Nudge to outline a large file; stay silent otherwise. Never blocks.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Orient an agent (session) or nudge before a large read (--read).

symbols.name: FileOutline
symbols.doc: One file's structural outline, drawn from the map index.

symbols.name: build
symbols.doc: Assemble the outline of one (already validated) file.

symbols.name: _under
symbols.doc: Whether a repo-relative path sits under a directory prefix.

symbols.name: collect_dir
symbols.doc: Outlines of every mapped file under a directory, prod first.

symbols.name: _outline_sig
symbols.doc: Signature using the bare name; nesting is shown by indentation.

symbols.name: _symbol_row
symbols.doc: One outline row: indent + line + signature + first doc line.

symbols.name: _file_header
symbols.doc: Header rows for a file: identity, module doc, parse error.

symbols.name: _sym_json
symbols.doc: Structured rendering of one outlined symbol.

symbols.name: _full_tokens
symbols.doc: Estimated token cost of reading the whole file (0 if unknown).

symbols.name: _size_line
symbols.doc: The 'full file vs outline' savings line, or ``None``.

symbols.name: size_estimate
symbols.doc: Token cost of reading a file whole vs. outlining it.

symbols.name: _render_text_file
symbols.doc: Render a single-file outline; header is non-droppable prefix.

symbols.name: _render_text_dir
symbols.doc: Render a directory rollup; whole low-priority files drop first.

symbols.name: _render_json
symbols.doc: Emit the outline(s) as structured JSON with a cost meter.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Render the outline of a file or directory.

symbols.name: paths_matching
symbols.doc: File paths equal to ``path`` or ending in ``/path``.

symbols.name: resolve_target
symbols.doc: Resolve a target string to a symbol.

symbols.name: _related
symbols.doc: Adjacent symbols plus module-level pseudo-callers.

symbols.name: _sym_line
symbols.doc: One-line text rendering of a symbol.

symbols.name: _sym_json
symbols.doc: Structured rendering of a symbol.

symbols.name: _emit_lines
symbols.doc: Print rows trimmed to the caps and return the cost meter.

symbols.name: _fit_entries
symbols.doc: Trim JSON result entries to the caps, metered on their JSON cost.

symbols.name: report_unresolved
symbols.doc: Explain a failed resolution and return the exit code.

symbols.name: _edge_key
symbols.doc: The ``edge_lines`` key for a relation row.

symbols.name: _site_rows
symbols.doc: One row per call site for a relation, or a def-line fallback.

symbols.name: _module_rows
symbols.doc: Rows for a module-level pseudo-caller.

symbols.name: _run_relation
symbols.doc: Execute callers/callees for a resolved symbol.

symbols.name: _run_uses
symbols.doc: Execute the uses action: who references an external name.

symbols.name: _run_symbol
symbols.doc: Execute the symbol card action.

symbols.name: _run_file
symbols.doc: Execute the file action: list a file's symbols.

symbols.name: _dispatch
symbols.doc: Route one query action to its executor.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Execute one query action against a loaded index.

symbols.name: normalize_terms
symbols.doc: Split text into lowercase, identifier-aware search terms.

symbols.name: TaskContext
symbols.doc: The live task an emission should be ranked against.

symbols.name: is_empty
symbols.doc: Whether there is no usable task signal at all.

symbols.name: Candidate
symbols.doc: A rankable item (a symbol or a file).

symbols.name: Scorer
symbols.doc: A relevance scorer: task + candidates -> normalized [0, 1] scores.

symbols.name: score
symbols.doc: Score each candidate in ``[0, 1]``, keyed by ``Candidate.id``.

symbols.name: LexicalScorer
symbols.doc: Pure lexical relevance: term overlap plus a path boost.

symbols.name: score
symbols.doc: Score candidates by lexical overlap with the task.

symbols.name: _raw
symbols.doc: Unnormalized relevance of one candidate.

symbols.name: _path_boost
symbols.doc: Boost for a candidate whose file is in the diff or recent set.

symbols.name: _min_max
symbols.doc: Min-max normalize a score map to ``[0, 1]``.

symbols.name: blended_scores
symbols.doc: Blend task relevance with structural centrality.

symbols.name: _git_diff_paths
symbols.doc: Repo-relative paths in the working diff (staged + unstaged).

symbols.name: task_context
symbols.doc: Assemble a :class:`TaskContext` from a prompt and the repo state.

symbols.name: _rels
symbols.doc: Relation rows with their call-site lines.

symbols.name: _symbols
symbols.doc: Per-symbol payload for the browser, keyed by symbol id.

symbols.name: _files
symbols.doc: Per-file payload (symbol ids only; details live in ``symbols``).

symbols.name: _stats
symbols.doc: Header counts mirroring ``dekko summary``.

symbols.name: build_document
symbols.doc: Build the browser-facing document inlined into the page.

symbols.name: _json_island
symbols.doc: Serialize ``doc`` safe to embed in a ``<script>`` island.

symbols.name: render
symbols.doc: Assemble the complete HTML page for a built document.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Write the interactive HTML map, guarding against oversized output.

symbols.name: render_json
symbols.doc: Serialize the full graph (including external calls) to JSON.

symbols.name: BackboneRow
symbols.doc: One file's line in the navigation index.

symbols.name: BackboneGroup
symbols.doc: A directory and its rows, for path-amortized rendering.

symbols.name: compute_backbone
symbols.doc: Build the deterministic file backbone (the FR1 floor).

symbols.name: render_backbone
symbols.doc: Render backbone groups to dense lean lines.

symbols.name: _row_line
symbols.doc: A single indented file row, with purpose when width allows.

symbols.name: _collapsed_line
symbols.doc: One-line summary of an all-demotable directory.

symbols.name: SymbolAtom
symbols.doc: A sheddable per-symbol unit: its FR2 name and FR4 signature.

symbols.name: _centrality
symbols.doc: Fan-in weighted by normalized file churn (Q1, ladder §5).

symbols.name: build_atoms
symbols.doc: Build per-file FR2/FR4 atoms with Q1 centrality.

symbols.name: centrality_key
symbols.doc: Drop-order key for the ladder: shed lowest centrality first.

symbols.name: module_edges
symbols.doc: The coarse directory-level dependency edges (FR3).

symbols.name: render_module_edges
symbols.doc: Render module edges as dense per-source lines (FR3).

symbols.name: LeanModel
symbols.doc: Everything the ladder can render, at full fidelity.

symbols.name: CapConfig
symbols.doc: Cap-scaling knobs (Q3); ``override`` is the ``--budget`` flag.

symbols.name: LeanReport
symbols.doc: What the ladder shed, for the self-describing header (NFR5).

symbols.name: per_signal
symbols.doc: Tokens spent per signal covered (FR-D3), or ``None``.

symbols.name: floored
symbols.doc: Whether the path-only floor was reached.

symbols.name: dropped_any
symbols.doc: Whether any depth was shed at all.

symbols.name: _drops
symbols.doc: Human labels for each shed dimension, in ladder order.

symbols.name: footer
symbols.doc: The header's first line: budget, density, and what was elided.

symbols.name: as_dict
symbols.doc: Structured ``meta`` object for JSON output.

symbols.name: _LeanState
symbols.doc: Mutable shed state the ladder advances through (internal).

symbols.name: build_mermaid
symbols.doc: A fenced mermaid block of the directory graph (FR6/Q5).

symbols.name: build_model
symbols.doc: Assemble the full-fidelity lean model from the map.

symbols.name: effective_cap
symbols.doc: The hard token cap (Q3): repo-scaled and floor-aware.

symbols.name: _floor_cost
symbols.doc: Token cost of the path-only floor plus the header reserve.

symbols.name: render
symbols.doc: Render the lean map under ``cap`` via the NFR2 ladder (§3).

symbols.name: _force_dense_sigs
symbols.doc: FR-D1: drop signatures for all but the top-K central atoms.

symbols.name: _count_signals
symbols.doc: Files + symbols actually rendered (FR-D3 density numerator).

symbols.name: generate
symbols.doc: One call: build the model, pick the cap, render the lean map.

symbols.name: _relevance_scores
symbols.doc: Blend task relevance with Q1 centrality over the live atoms.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Render the lean map to stdout, JSON, or a file.

symbols.name: _shed_symbols
symbols.doc: Ladder rungs 3-4: drop signatures, then names, lowest first.

symbols.name: _shed_purpose
symbols.doc: Ladder rung 6: shrink purpose width toward the path-only floor.

symbols.name: _live_atoms
symbols.doc: Atoms in expanded (non-demotable) groups, lowest-survival first.

symbols.name: _render_document
symbols.doc: Render the full lean body at the current shed state.

symbols.name: _group_block
symbols.doc: One directory: collapsed line, or header + file/atom rows.

symbols.name: _atom_lines
symbols.doc: Symbol rows under a file, at their current shed form.

symbols.name: _atom_form
symbols.doc: Rendering of an atom: ``sig``, ``name``, or dropped (``None``).

symbols.name: _edge_block
symbols.doc: The FR3 module-edge section, or nothing when shed/empty.

symbols.name: _assemble
symbols.doc: Prepend the NFR5 header, recording the final token count.

symbols.name: _header_lines
symbols.doc: The self-describing header (NFR5): budget, drops, recovery.

symbols.name: RunStats
symbols.doc: Provenance counts for the human-facing freshness/trust line.

symbols.name: _dir_of
symbols.doc: Directory portion of a repo-relative path (``.`` for the root).

symbols.name: _is_minor
symbols.doc: A file with nothing worth its own section.

symbols.name: _file_fan_in
symbols.doc: Total inbound call edges across a file's symbols.

symbols.name: _order_files
symbols.doc: Reorder file sections, keeping each directory's files together.

symbols.name: _ordered_symbols
symbols.doc: A file's symbols, by inbound degree when ``order == 'fan-in'``.

symbols.name: _owner_path
symbols.doc: File path owning an anchor key (a file path or a symbol id).

symbols.name: _Anchors
symbols.doc: Stable, unique markdown anchor ids for files and symbols.

symbols.name: get
symbols.doc: Return the anchor id for a file path or symbol id.

symbols.name: _Links
symbols.doc: Resolve markdown hrefs for anchors, single-file or sharded.

symbols.name: on_page
symbols.doc: Set the current page slug (``None`` for the index page).

symbols.name: anchor
symbols.doc: Anchor id for a key (for the ``<a id=...>`` target).

symbols.name: href
symbols.doc: Full href to a key's anchor from the current page.

symbols.name: _dir_slugs
symbols.doc: Unique page slug per directory, in first-seen order.

symbols.name: _indexes
symbols.doc: Build the per-render lookup tables (symbols, ambiguous calls).

symbols.name: render_markdown
symbols.doc: Render the single-file ``MAP.md`` document.

symbols.name: _hotspot_rows
symbols.doc: Churn x fan-in rows for the overview, or empty without a root.

symbols.name: render_map
symbols.doc: Render the map as one or more ``(page_path, content)`` pairs.

symbols.name: _exceeds_threshold
symbols.doc: Whether a single-file document is large enough to auto-shard.

symbols.name: _sharded
symbols.doc: Render the index page plus one page per directory.

symbols.name: _overview_diagram
symbols.doc: A fenced ``mermaid`` architecture block for the overview.

symbols.name: _header
symbols.doc: Document title and stats block.

symbols.name: _toc
symbols.doc: Table of contents: production files by directory, tests collapsed.

symbols.name: _toc_entries
symbols.doc: Per-directory TOC bullets, with minor files collapsed to one line.

symbols.name: _toc_bullet
symbols.doc: One file's TOC bullet: link, symbol count, and purpose line.

symbols.name: _file_section
symbols.doc: One ``##`` section per file with all its symbols.

symbols.name: _symbol_block
symbols.doc: Heading + relations for one symbol.

symbols.name: _relations
symbols.doc: ``calls`` / ``called by`` bullet lines for a symbol.

symbols.name: _link
symbols.doc: Markdown link to a symbol, or a plain label for top level.

symbols.name: resolve
symbols.doc: Resolve every raw call across the repo into a call graph.

symbols.name: _resolve_call
symbols.doc: Resolve one call and record it in the right bucket.

symbols.name: _pick_candidate
symbols.doc: Apply the resolution ladder; ``None`` means ambiguous.

symbols.name: _self_container
symbols.doc: Container qualname when the call goes through self/this.

symbols.name: _import_match
symbols.doc: Match candidates against import hints for this file.

symbols.name: _module_matches
symbols.doc: Check whether an import source plausibly names a file.

symbols.name: _build_index
symbols.doc: Map bare symbol name → all symbols with that name.

symbols.name: _build_name_path_index
symbols.doc: Map ``(bare name, file path)`` → the like-named symbols in that file.

symbols.name: _imports_by_file
symbols.doc: Map file path → local name → import record.

symbols.name: _build_adjacency
symbols.doc: Fill ``calls_out`` / ``calls_in`` from the edge list.

symbols.name: ToolError
symbols.doc: A tool failed in a way the agent should see as an error result.

symbols.name: Context
symbols.doc: Server-wide settings shared across tool calls.

symbols.name: _capture
symbols.doc: Run ``fn`` with stdout/stderr captured.

symbols.name: _require
symbols.doc: Return a required string argument or raise ``ToolError``.

symbols.name: _root_of
symbols.doc: Resolve the target root from a tool's ``root`` argument.

symbols.name: _task_of
symbols.doc: Build a task context from a tool's ``task`` argument, or ``None``.

symbols.name: _index_for
symbols.doc: Load (auto-regenerating) the map for a tool call.

symbols.name: _relation_tool
symbols.doc: Run a query action (symbol/callers/callees) and return text.

symbols.name: tool_query_symbol
symbols.doc: Signature card for one symbol.

symbols.name: tool_get_callers
symbols.doc: Symbols (and module-level sites) that call the target.

symbols.name: tool_get_callees
symbols.doc: Symbols the target calls.

symbols.name: tool_find_usages
symbols.doc: Symbols that reference an external (out-of-repo) name.

symbols.name: tool_get_context_pack
symbols.doc: Minimal signature neighborhood for editing a symbol or file.

symbols.name: tool_outline
symbols.doc: Structural outline of a file or directory (signatures, no bodies).

symbols.name: tool_trace_path
symbols.doc: Shortest call path(s) from one symbol to another.

symbols.name: tool_find_unused
symbols.doc: Symbols with no inbound calls (dead-code leads).

symbols.name: tool_impacted_tests
symbols.doc: Test files impacted by changes since a git rev.

symbols.name: tool_workset
symbols.doc: One budgeted bundle for a change or symbol.

symbols.name: tool_stats
symbols.doc: Fan-in/out hotspots, largest files, language mix.

symbols.name: _summary_text
symbols.doc: Render the repo digest, reused by the tool and the resource.

symbols.name: tool_summary
symbols.doc: Compact repo digest: directories, hotspots, entry points.

symbols.name: tool_lean
symbols.doc: Budget-capped navigation map of the whole repo.

symbols.name: tool_add_note
symbols.doc: Anchor a durable note to a symbol.

symbols.name: tool_list_notes
symbols.doc: List notes for a symbol, or all notes in the repo.

symbols.name: tool_ledger
symbols.doc: What this session has already put in context (from the transcript).

symbols.name: tool_map_status
symbols.doc: Whether the map on disk is fresh, with what changed if stale.

symbols.name: tool_refresh_map
symbols.doc: Regenerate the map (optionally a full, uncached rebuild).

symbols.name: _prefixed
symbols.doc: Ensure a tool error message carries a single ``dekko:`` prefix.

symbols.name: _ok
symbols.doc: Build a JSON-RPC success response.

symbols.name: _err
symbols.doc: Build a JSON-RPC error response.

symbols.name: _handle_initialize
symbols.doc: Answer the lifecycle ``initialize`` handshake.

symbols.name: _handle_tools_list
symbols.doc: Answer ``tools/list`` with the public tool schemas.

symbols.name: _handle_tools_call
symbols.doc: Dispatch a ``tools/call`` to a registered handler.

symbols.name: _handle_resources_list
symbols.doc: Answer ``resources/list`` with the published resources.

symbols.name: _handle_resources_read
symbols.doc: Answer ``resources/read`` for a known resource URI.

symbols.name: handle
symbols.doc: Route one JSON-RPC message, returning a response or ``None``.

symbols.name: _send
symbols.doc: Write one newline-delimited JSON-RPC message to stdout.

symbols.name: serve
symbols.doc: Run the stdio MCP loop until stdin closes.

symbols.name: read_lines
symbols.doc: Read a repo file's lines, or an empty list on failure.

symbols.name: _edge_count
symbols.doc: Total resolved call edges, including module-level origins.

symbols.name: _hotspots
symbols.doc: Top symbols by adjacency size (fan-in or fan-out).

symbols.name: _largest_files
symbols.doc: Files with the most symbols.

symbols.name: _language_mix
symbols.doc: Per-language ``(language, file_count, symbol_count)``.

symbols.name: compute
symbols.doc: Build the full stats document.

symbols.name: _print_hotspots
symbols.doc: Print a labeled fan-in/fan-out ranking.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Print map statistics as text or JSON.

symbols.name: _id_dir
symbols.doc: Directory of the file a symbol or module id belongs to.

symbols.name: _dir_purpose
symbols.doc: Best purpose line for a directory: its index file's doc, else any.

symbols.name: _edge_coupling
symbols.doc: Per-directory ``(internal_edges, cross_dir_edges)`` counts.

symbols.name: _directories
symbols.doc: Per-directory rollup rows, most symbols first.

symbols.name: _entrypoints
symbols.doc: Likely entry points: ``main`` plus uncalled exported/decorated.

symbols.name: compute
symbols.doc: Build the summary document.

symbols.name: _git_churn
symbols.doc: Per-file commit-touch counts over the recent window.

symbols.name: file_churn
symbols.doc: Per-file commit-touch counts over the recent window.

symbols.name: _file_fan_in
symbols.doc: Total incoming call edges to every symbol defined in a file.

symbols.name: churn_hotspots
symbols.doc: Files that change often *and* are widely depended on.

symbols.name: _fmt_module
symbols.doc: Human label for a hotspot id (module-level origins included).

symbols.name: render_text
symbols.doc: Render the digest as compact text.

symbols.name: _append_ranked
symbols.doc: Append a labelled fan-in/out ranking, if non-empty.

symbols.name: render_overview
symbols.doc: Render a ``compute`` document as a MAP.md ``## Overview`` section.

symbols.name: _overview_largest
symbols.doc: A linked list of the files with the most symbols.

symbols.name: _overview_hotspots
symbols.doc: Churn x fan-in risk table, linked to each file's section.

symbols.name: _overview_dirs
symbols.doc: Per-directory rollup table.

symbols.name: _overview_ranked
symbols.doc: A linked fan-in/fan-out ranking with its degree count.

symbols.name: _overview_entrypoints
symbols.doc: Linked entry-point list.

symbols.name: _overview_errors
symbols.doc: Linked parse-error list.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Print the summary as text or JSON.

symbols.name: signature
symbols.doc: Format a symbol as a one-line signature.

symbols.name: oneline
symbols.doc: Collapse text to its first non-empty line, truncated to ``limit``.

symbols.name: dir_of
symbols.doc: Directory portion of a repo-relative path (``.`` for the root).

symbols.name: _tokenizer_mode
symbols.doc: Resolve the backend mode from ``DEKKO_TOKENIZER`` (default auto).

symbols.name: _encoder
symbols.doc: Lazily build the tiktoken encoder, or ``None`` to use chars/4.

symbols.name: tokenizer_backend
symbols.doc: The active counting backend: ``"tiktoken"`` or ``"chars4"``.

symbols.name: _count_fragment
symbols.doc: Token count of one text fragment: accurate, else chars/4.

symbols.name: estimate_tokens
symbols.doc: Estimate the token cost of ``text``.

symbols.name: count_lines
symbols.doc: Sum cached per-line token counts; for hot budget loops.

symbols.name: token_footer
symbols.doc: Self-metering footer line for text-mode output.

symbols.name: Meter
symbols.doc: Cost/omission summary for a budget-capped tool response.

symbols.name: omitted
symbols.doc: Rows dropped to satisfy the caps.

symbols.name: per_signal
symbols.doc: Tokens spent per signal covered (FR-D3), or ``None``.

symbols.name: truncated_by
symbols.doc: Which cap bit: ``"budget"``, ``"limit"``, or ``None``.

symbols.name: _density
symbols.doc: The optional ``· N signals`` density suffix (FR-D3).

symbols.name: footer
symbols.doc: One-line text footer, stable enough to parse.

symbols.name: as_dict
symbols.doc: Structured ``meta`` object for JSON output.

symbols.name: fit_to_budget
symbols.doc: Cap lines by count then token budget, returning kept + Meter.

symbols.name: _shortest_paths
symbols.doc: Find up to ``max_paths`` shortest call paths from start to goal.

symbols.name: _bfs_preds
symbols.doc: BFS from start, recording every minimal-depth predecessor.

symbols.name: _relax
symbols.doc: Expand one node's callees, returning the goal depth if first hit.

symbols.name: _reconstruct
symbols.doc: Rebuild up to ``max_paths`` paths from a predecessor map.

symbols.name: _resolve_endpoint
symbols.doc: Resolve one endpoint, printing and coding any failure.

symbols.name: _path_line
symbols.doc: Render one path as an arrow chain of ``path:line`` hops.

symbols.name: _path_json
symbols.doc: Render one path as a list of symbol docs.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Trace shortest call path(s) from one symbol to another.

symbols.name: _matches_globs
symbols.doc: Whether a path (or its basename) matches any user root glob.

symbols.name: _is_dunder
symbols.doc: Whether a name is a Python dunder, e.g. ``__init__``.

symbols.name: reexported_names
symbols.doc: Names imported into any ``__init__.py`` (package re-exports).

symbols.name: _is_root
symbols.doc: Whether a symbol is a plausible entry point (not dead code).

symbols.name: _used_keys
symbols.doc: ``(path, qualname)`` keys that any inbound edge keeps alive.

symbols.name: find_unused
symbols.doc: Return symbols with no inbound use that are not roots.

symbols.name: _sym_json
symbols.doc: Structured rendering of one unused symbol.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Report unused symbols as text or JSON.

symbols.name: _git_files
symbols.doc: List repo files via git, or ``None`` when not a git repo.

symbols.name: _walk_files
symbols.doc: Walk the tree manually, honoring a root ``.gitignore``.

symbols.name: _join
symbols.doc: Join a relative POSIX dir (possibly ``.``) and a name.

symbols.name: _in_excluded_dir
symbols.doc: Check whether any path component is a default-excluded dir.

symbols.name: _matches_any
symbols.doc: Match the basename against glob patterns.

symbols.name: discover
symbols.doc: Find all mappable source files under a root directory.

symbols.name: _classify
symbols.doc: Categorize one candidate path.

symbols.name: Seed
symbols.doc: What a change (rev or symbol) resolves to before composition.

symbols.name: Workset
symbols.doc: A built bundle, ready to render.

symbols.name: _Row
symbols.doc: One droppable output row, tagged for budget tiering and JSON.

symbols.name: _rank_files
symbols.doc: Touched files, most-central (highest aggregate degree) first.

symbols.name: _make_seed
symbols.doc: Rank a raw touched set into a fully-populated ``Seed``.

symbols.name: seed_from_rev
symbols.doc: Seed from a worktree-vs-rev diff; ``None`` on an unexportable rev.

symbols.name: seed_from_symbol
symbols.doc: Seed from a single symbol; ``(None, candidates)`` if unresolved.

symbols.name: _apply_task
symbols.doc: Re-rank a seed's touched symbols and files by blended relevance.

symbols.name: _rerank_touched
symbols.doc: Touched symbols, most task-relevant first (centrality blended in).

symbols.name: _rerank_files
symbols.doc: Touched files, most task-relevant first (aggregate degree blended).

symbols.name: build
symbols.doc: Compose a seed into outlines and top-centrality symbol packs.

symbols.name: _manifest
symbols.doc: The non-droppable header: seed, counts, and the pytest hint.

symbols.name: _roster_row
symbols.doc: One condensed breadth row: path, language, doc, symbol count.

symbols.name: _entry_names
symbols.doc: Comma-joined ``qualname (path:line)`` for one edge direction.

symbols.name: _pack_block
symbols.doc: Compact depth block: signature, doc, hop-1 callers/callees.

symbols.name: _rows
symbols.doc: Flatten the three value tiers into one ordered droppable list.

symbols.name: _fit
symbols.doc: Apply the shared budget over the manifest prefix plus all rows.

symbols.name: _render_text
symbols.doc: Render the bundle as text: manifest, tiered rows, cost footer.

symbols.name: _kept_view
symbols.doc: Reduce kept rows to surviving files (with symbols) and packs.

symbols.name: _entry_json
symbols.doc: Structured neighbor: id, path, line, signature.

symbols.name: _pack_json
symbols.doc: Compact structured pack matching :func:`_pack_block`.

symbols.name: _outline_json
symbols.doc: One file's structured outline, limited to its surviving symbols.

symbols.name: _render_json
symbols.doc: Render the bundle as JSON, reflecting exactly what the budget kept.

symbols.name: run
symbols.doc: Build and render a work-set bundle for a change or a symbol.

symbols.name: make_mapped_repo
symbols.doc: Factory: write source files into tmp_path and map them.

symbols.name: _count_extractions
symbols.doc: Patch ``extract_one`` to record every file it parses.

symbols.name: _git
symbols.doc: Run a git command in ``root``, raising on failure.

symbols.name: _commit_all
symbols.doc: Stage and commit everything currently in the tree.

symbols.name: _repo
symbols.doc: Create a committed git repo and map it.

symbols.name: _count_hashes
symbols.doc: Record every path that gets content-hashed during a check.

symbols.name: _hotspot_index
symbols.doc: Three files where ``a.py::core`` has fan-in 2 (b and c call it).

symbols.name: _floor_python
symbols.doc: Find a pre-3.12 interpreter on PATH or via uv, or ``None``.

symbols.name: _toc_entry
symbols.doc: The TOC bullet for a file, scoped to the ``## Contents`` section.

symbols.name: _call
symbols.doc: Issue one tools/call and return its result block.

symbols.name: _resolve_page
symbols.doc: Resolve a link's page part relative to the page it appears on.

symbols.name: _pyproject_version
symbols.doc: The ``[project]`` version from pyproject.toml.

symbols.name: _json_version
symbols.doc: Follow ``keys`` into a JSON file and return the value.

symbols.name: _uvlock_version
symbols.doc: The pinned dekko version recorded in uv.lock.
